actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) slashing damage.

actions.name: Light Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

traits.name: Dark Devotion
traits.desc: The cultist has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) slashing damage.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The kobold has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its allies is adjacent to the creature and not incapacitated.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Keen Smell
traits.desc: The rat has advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The rat has advantage on attack rolls if at least one ally is adjacent to the target.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

name: Skeleton
languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

name: Zombie
languages: understands the languages it knew in life but can't speak

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.desc: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hit points, it must make a CON saving throw DC 5 + damage dealt, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hit point instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Nimble Escape
traits.desc: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

traits.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
traits.desc: The wolf has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing or smell.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The wolf has advantage on attack rolls if at least one ally is adjacent to the target.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 STR saving throw or be knocked prone.

traits.name: Martial Advantage
traits.desc: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits with a weapon attack if another hobgoblin ally is within 5 feet of the target.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) slashing damage, or 6 (1d10+1) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage.

traits.name: Rampage
traits.desc: When the gnoll reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack on its turn, it can move up to half its speed and make a bite attack as a bonus action.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

name: Shadow
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.desc: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

traits.name: Shadow Stealth
traits.desc: While in dim light or darkness, the shadow can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

traits.name: Sunlight Weakness
traits.desc: While in sunlight, the shadow has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.

actions.name: Strength Drain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6+2) necrotic damage, and the target's STR score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its STR to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a new shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a DC 10 CON saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

traits.name: Brute
traits.desc: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the bugbear hits with it (included in the attack).

traits.name: Surprise Attack
traits.desc: If the bugbear surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.

actions.name: Morningstar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6+2) piercing damage in melee, or 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage at range.

name: Giant Spider
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 10

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: The spider can climb difficult surfaces including upside down on ceilings without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Sense
traits.desc: While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.desc: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 CON saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

actions.name: Web
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is restrained by webbing. As an action, the restrained target can make a DC 12 STR check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

name: Wight
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: While in sunlight, the wight has disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The wight makes two longsword attacks or two longbow attacks. It can use its Life Drain in place of one longsword attack.

actions.name: Life Drain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. A humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a zombie under the wight's control.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8+2) slashing damage, or 7 (1d10+2) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage.

traits.name: Keen Sight and Smell
traits.desc: The owlbear has advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight or smell.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10+5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The captain makes three melee attacks: two with its scimitar and one with its dagger. Or the captain makes two ranged attacks with its daggers.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: The captain adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the captain must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage.

traits.name: Keen Smell
traits.desc: The troll has advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The troll regains 10 hp at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The troll makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8+5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rock
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10+5) bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Tail Spike Regrowth
traits.desc: The manticore has twenty-four tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the manticore finishes a long rest.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The manticore makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws or three with its tail spikes.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail Spike
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 100/200 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage.

traits.name: Petrifying Gaze
traits.desc: When a creature that can see the medusa's eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the medusa, the medusa can force it to make a DC 14 CON saving throw if the medusa isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature is instantly petrified. Otherwise, a creature that fails its save begins to turn to stone and is restrained. The restrained creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is petrified until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The medusa makes either three melee attacks—one with its snake hair and two with its shortsword—or two ranged attacks with its longbow.

actions.name: Snake Hair
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

traits.name: Petrifying Gaze
traits.desc: If a creature starts its turn within 30 feet of the basilisk and the two can see each other, the basilisk can force the creature to make a DC 12 CON saving throw if the basilisk isn't incapacitated. On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is restrained. It must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is petrified until freed by greater restoration or other magic.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6+3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

name: Vampire Spawn
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The vampire regains 10 hp at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hp and isn't in sunlight or running water. If it takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.desc: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Vampire Weaknesses
traits.desc: Sunlight Hypersensitivity: The vampire takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The vampire makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (2d4+3) slashing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 13).

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains hp equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The mind flayer has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Innate Spellcasting (Psionics)
traits.desc: The mind flayer's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components: At will: detect thoughts, levitate. 1/day each: dominate monster, plane shift (self only).

actions.name: Tentacles
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 15 (2d10+4) psychic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 15) and must succeed on a DC 15 INT saving throw or be stunned until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Extract Brain
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one incapacitated humanoid grappled by the mind flayer. Hit: 55 (10d10) piercing damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the mind flayer kills the target by extracting and devouring its brain.

actions.name: Mind Blast
actions.desc: The mind flayer magically emits psychic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 15 INT saving throw or take 22 (4d8+4) psychic damage and be stunned for 1 minute.

traits.name: Antimagic Cone
traits.desc: The beholder's central eye creates an area of antimagic, as in the antimagic field spell, in a 150-foot cone. At the start of each of its turns, the beholder decides which way the cone faces and whether the cone is active.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage.

actions.name: Eye Rays
actions.desc: The beholder shoots three of the following magical eye rays at random (reroll duplicates), choosing one to three targets it can see within 120 ft. of it. 1. Charm Ray. 2. Paralyzing Ray. 3. Fear Ray. 4. Slowing Ray. 5. Enervation Ray. 6. Telekinetic Ray. 7. Sleep Ray. 8. Petrification Ray. 9. Disintegration Ray. 10. Death Ray.

legendaryActions.name: Eye Ray
legendaryActions.desc: The beholder uses one random eye ray.

name: Young Red Dragon
senses: blindsight 30 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 18

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10+6) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6+6) slashing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath
actions.desc: The dragon exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 DEX saving throw, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

name: Adult Red Dragon
senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 23

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10+8) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6+8) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d8+8) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of the dragon's choice within 120 feet and aware of it must succeed on a DC 19 WIS saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

actions.name: Fire Breath
actions.desc: The dragon exhales fire in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 21 DEX saving throw, taking 63 (18d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half on a success.

legendaryActions.name: Detect
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon makes a Perception check.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Attack
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendaryActions.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet must succeed on a DC 22 DEX saving throw or take 15 (2d6+8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

name: Ancient Red Dragon
senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 26

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (2d10+10) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d6+10) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +17 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d8+10) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of the dragon's choice within 120 feet must succeed on a DC 21 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute.

actions.name: Fire Breath
actions.desc: The dragon exhales fire in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 24 DEX saving throw, taking 91 (26d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half on a success.

legendaryActions.name: Detect
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon makes a Perception check.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Attack
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendaryActions.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 ft must succeed on a DC 25 DEX save or take 17 (2d6+10) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

name: Tarrasque
damageImmunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.desc: If the tarrasque fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The tarrasque has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reflective Carapace
traits.desc: Any time the tarrasque is targeted by a magic missile spell, a line spell, or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll a d6. On a 1 to 5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected, and the effect is reflected back at the caster as though it originated from the tarrasque.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.desc: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The tarrasque can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes five attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, one with its horns, and one with its tail.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12+10) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 20). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tarrasque can't bite another target.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d8+10) slashing damage.

actions.name: Horns
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (4d10+10) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (4d6+10) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 20 STR saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
actions.desc: Each creature of the tarrasque's choice within 120 feet must succeed on a DC 17 WIS saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

actions.name: Swallow
actions.desc: The tarrasque makes one bite attack against a Large or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target takes the bite's damage, the target is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the tarrasque, and it takes 56 (16d6) acid damage at the start of each of the tarrasque's turns. If the tarrasque takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the tarrasque must succeed on a DC 20 CON saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures.

legendaryActions.name: Attack
legendaryActions.desc: The tarrasque makes one claw attack or tail attack.

legendaryActions.name: Move
legendaryActions.desc: The tarrasque moves up to half its speed.

legendaryActions.name: Chomp (Costs 2 Actions)
legendaryActions.desc: The tarrasque makes one bite attack or uses its Swallow.
